description_long: This handbag features a soft, woven exterior with alternating horizontal stripes of purple and white, giving it a vibrant and playful appearance. The body of the bag is rectangular with rounded edges, and it is constructed from a thick, knitted or crocheted material that suggests a cozy, handmade quality. A single, sturdy handle extends from one side, seamlessly integrated into the bag's structure and made from the same material as the body. The interior appears spacious and flexible, likely lined with fabric or left unlined for a lightweight feel. There are no visible external pockets, closures, or decorative hardware, emphasizing the simplicity and functionality of the design. The overall look is casual and suitable for everyday use in urban environments.
description: A rectangular, soft, woven handbag with purple and white horizontal stripes and a single integrated handle. The design is simple, cozy, and casual, with no visible hardware or decorations.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bag and the handle extending to the right, with clear visibility of the purple and white striped pattern.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the oval opening of the bag and the handle loop, with the stripes visible along the sides.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, with the handle now extending to the left and the same striped pattern visible.
description_view_3: End view showing the rounded profile of the bag and the handle attachment, with the stripes wrapping around the body.
attribute_strap_type: single short handle, non-adjustable, integrated into the body of the bag
attribute_pattern: horizontal stripes in purple and white
